Grounded2Minimal (Steam)
========================

Package contents:
- Grounded2Minimal.dll

Usage:
1. Load into the game world.
2. Inject Grounded2Minimal.dll into Grounded2-WinGRTS-Shipping.exe.
3. Optionally use the matching Injector-STEAM.exe asset from this release.

Project page:
https://github.com/x0reaxeax/Grounded2Minimal
